title: SMIC REPORTS 2025 FOURTH QUARTER RESULTS (FY2025 revenue $9,326.8mn +16.2% YoY; GM 21.0%; capex $8.1bn; capacity 1,059k 8-inch-equiv wafers/month; utilization 93.5%; 2026 capex guided roughly flat)
publisher: Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation (SMIC official press release, smics.com)

title: SMIC REPORTS 2026 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS (Q1 2026 revenue $2,505.5mn +11.5% YoY +0.7% QoQ; gross profit $503.6mn; GM 20.1%; Q2 2026 guidance revenue +14-16% QoQ, GM 20-22%)
publisher: Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation (SMIC official press release, smics.com)

title: 中芯国际回应和华为共同建厂传闻（上证e互动官方回复："该公司原则上不在e互动上做回应"，对华为合建晶圆厂传闻不予确认或否认）
publisher: 澎湃新闻 (The Paper), reporting SMIC's official 上证e互动 investor-platform reply

title: 被美国商务部列入"实体清单" 中芯国际：正寻求解决方案（公司自查评估认为对10纳米及以下先进制程研发和产能建设产生重大不利影响；否认涉军并称将继续与美方沟通）
publisher: 新浪财经 (Sina Finance), reporting SMIC's official statement dated 2020-12-20

title: 中芯国际集成电路制造有限公司2025年年度报告摘要（营业收入人民币67,323.2百万元+16.5%；归母净利润5,040.7百万元+36.3%；购建固定资产等支付现金59,950.6百万元+9.9%；全球第二/中国大陆第一；无分红）
publisher: 上海证券报/中国证券网 (cnstock.com) — SSE法定信息披露媒体，转载已备案摘要公告全文

title: China Reportedly Aims to Boost 7nm, 5nm Output Fivefold in Two Years, Driven by SMIC, Hua Hong (Huawei named scaling production role; Ascend 950PR/950DT 2026 chipset launches cited as demand driver; current <20k wafers/month scaling to 100k in 1-2 years, 500k by 2030)

Decoding DeepSeek V4: How Huawei's Ascend 950 PR Is Powering China's Push to Break CUDA Dependence (Ascend 950PR manufactured by SMIC N+3 process, ~5nm-class; Ascend 910C manufactured by SMIC 7nm process; ~600,000 910C units targeted 2026, total Ascend capacity to 1.6 million units)
publisher: TrendForce (citing eastmoney.com and EE Times China)

title: SMIC Posts Record $9.3B in 2025 Sales; 7nm Yields Reportedly Weigh on Margins (yield-margin framing explicitly attributed to Sina/Dolphin Research, not SMIC's own stated reason which is depreciation; no yield % given; no Huawei/Ascend named in this article)

Huawei Ascend Production Ramp: Die Banks, TSMC Continued Production, HBM is The Bottleneck (both TSMC and SMIC named as historical Ascend 910B/910C manufacturers; ~2.9 million pre-sanctions TSMC die bank; SMIC 7nm-and-below capacity ~45k wafers/month by end-2025; SMIC alone could support >1 million 910C units/year)
中芯国际2025年度收入创新高 折旧致毛利率承压 全年资本开支达81亿美元（公司自述毛利率下降主因折旧增加，非先进制程良率；2026年资本开支指引大致持平；全文未提华为/昇腾）
中芯国际2026年Q1财报解读：经营现金流51.32亿扭亏、财务费用同比增超6.7亿（营收176.17亿元即人民币17.617十亿元，同比增8.1%；中国区收入占比提升至88.9%，去年同期84.3%）
中芯国际2025年报解读：营收增16.5%至673.23亿元 扣非净利大涨55.9%（消费电子43.2%为最大应用；工业与汽车11.0%；中国区85.6%+1pct，美国11.6%，欧亚2.8%）
中芯国际Q1营收25亿美元 对客户需求及订单状况乐观 智能手机收入占比创下新低（智能手机占比降至18.9%，去年同期24.2%，为至少2021年以来最低；消费类存储今年三季度或迎转好；产能利用率93.1%）
publisher: 科创板日报/上海证券报 (chinastarmarket.cn)

title: 中芯国际2026Q1业绩会｜精简问答纪要（全文）（管理层称"已服务AI与高端消费客户"但不具名；AI收入贡献"两位数"未具体量化；"不会盲目扩先进产能"；Q1新增约9000片/月12英寸当量产能）
中芯国际业绩会，问答环节信息量很大（联席CEO赵海军："AI配套芯片的需求强劲"，聚焦电源管理/电源供应/数字传输等配套领域而非具名AI芯片本身；产能利用率93.1%环比降2.6pct；Q2指引营收+14%-16%）
